title: uragoga heteromorpha
side_effects: Uragoga heteromorpha can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In severe cases, it may also cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to liver damage and kidney problems, as well as interact with other medications. Additionally, improper use may also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals.
